items.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. You can cancel your Pro or Enterprise plan at any time from your dashboard settings. No hidden fees or penalties.

items.q: Is my insurance policy data safe?
items.a: Your PDF is encrypted during upload (256-bit TLS), processed by our AI, and then permanently deleted. We only store the analysis report, never your original document.

items.q: What types of insurance policies can you scan?
items.a: We support all major Indian insurance types: Health, Term Life, Motor (Car & Bike), Home, Travel, and Business insurance — from all IRDAI-registered insurers.
Yes. If our AI finds no additional risks beyond the free preview, we offer a 100% refund within 7 days of purchase. Just email us at support@insuranceclarity.in.

items.q: Is there a free trial for Pro?
items.a: The Free plan gives you 2 full AI scans per month to evaluate our product. Each scan report's first 3 risks are shown free — no credit card required.

hlv.title: How Much Are You Worth?
hlv.subtitle: Calculated naturally. Find out exactly how much life insurance your family needs to maintain their lifestyle if you aren't around.
hlv.personalExpensesHint: Typically 20-35% of income goes to your personal travel, food, etc.
hlv.signInHint: Registered users can track HLV changes over time and get direct advisor checks.
hlv.insightRule: The 10x Rule is often insufficient in India due to high education inflation (10-12%).
hlv.insightRevisit: Your HLV should ideally be revisited every 5 years or after major life events like child birth or home loans.

taxBenefit.title: Old vs New Tax Check
taxBenefit.subtitle: See how your insurance premiums affect your tax liability under Section 80C and 80D. Find your perfect regime.
taxBenefit.newRegimeNote: In New Regime, your insurance premiums (₹{amount}) have zero impact on tax.
taxBenefit.oldRegimeSaving: In Old Regime, you are currently saving ₹{min} to ₹{max} in taxes just through insurance.
taxBenefit.budgetNote: Budget 2024 increased New Regime slabs. If your income is above 15L and you have less than 4.5L in total deductions, New Regime is usually better.

roomRent.title: The Room Rent Trap
roomRent.subtitle: Did you know? Choosing a room above your policy limit can reduce your entire hospital bill by the same percentage. Use this tool to visualize the loss.
roomRent.proportionateDesc: If you occupy a room more expensive than your limit, the insurer assumes you can afford better surgery too. They then cut payables for doctors, operation theater, and tests by the same ratio.
roomRent.suggestion1Desc: Always opt for plans like HDFC Ergo Optima Secure or Care Supreme that have no capping on room rent.
roomRent.suggestion2Desc: If your policy says 'Single Private Room', you are safe as long as you don't pick a Suite or Deluxe.

about.title: About
about.heroDesc: We're an independent educational platform with a simple mission: make insurance understandable for every Indian. No sales, no commissions, no jargon — just the truth about your policies.
about.missionP1: Insurance in India is complex by design. Policies run dozens of pages. Exclusions are buried in footnotes. Premiums are pushed by commission-driven agents. And millions of Indians discover the gaps in their coverage only at claim time — when it's too late.
about.missionP2: InsuranceClarity was born from frustration with this opacity. We believed there should be a platform that tells you what insurance companies don't want you to know — before you sign anything. So we built one.
about.missionP3: We decode policy documents, surface hidden exclusions, track real claim outcomes, and provide tools that help you compare policies on dimensions that actually matter for claims.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.desc: We expose what insurance companies hide — exclusions, sub-limits, waiting periods, and conditions that affect claims.

zeroBias.title: Zero Commission Bias
zeroBias.desc: We do not receive commissions from insurers. Our analysis is purely data-driven and consumer-focused.

consumerFirst.title: Consumer First
consumerFirst.desc: Our loyalty is to policyholders, not insurers. We advocate for fair treatment and informed choices.

dataDriven.title: Data-Driven
dataDriven.desc: All claims data and CSR figures are sourced from official IRDAI annual reports. We cite our sources.

about.disclaimerText: InsuranceClarity India is an educational content platform and is not an IRDAI-licensed insurance intermediary, broker, or agent. We do not sell, solicit, or negotiate insurance products. All content is for informational purposes only. Insurance is subject to IRDAI regulations. Please read all policy documents carefully and consult a licensed advisor before purchasing.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your insurance?
